geographic_restrictions: Buffalo, NY and surrounding Western New York region
project_area: Community development, economic justice, environmental sustainability, housing, criminal justice reform, education, health equity, arts and culture, and demographic research
demographic_requirements: Open to all applicants, with a focus on historically marginalized and low-income communities in Buffalo and Western New York
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofits, community organizations, researchers, government agencies, and individuals working on projects aligned with PPG's mission of building a more just, sustainable, and culturally vibrant Buffalo Niagara. Geographic focus is primarily on Buffalo and Western New York.
